description: Comprehensive telecom customer management server providing customer lookup, billing, usage tracking, and line control capabilities.

tools.name: get_customer_by_phone
tools.description: Find a customer by their primary contact or line-associated phone number.

phone_number.description: The primary or line-associated phone number used to identify the customer account.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

phone_number.description: The primary or line-associated phone number of the customer.

line_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for the mobile lines associated with this customer.

tools.name: get_customer_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve customer details by their unique ID.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.
The unique identifier of the customer account.

phone_number.description: The primary or line-associated phone number of the customer.

line_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for the mobile lines associated with this customer.

tools.name: get_customer_by_name
tools.description: Search for customers by name and date of birth.

dob.description: The customer's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

phone_number.description: The primary or line-associated phone number of the customer.

line_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for the mobile lines associated with this customer.

customers.description: List of customers matching the provided name and date of birth.

tools.name: get_details_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve detailed customer information including billing and contact data.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.
The unique identifier of the customer account.

phone_number.description: The primary or line-associated phone number of the customer.

line_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for the mobile lines associated with this customer.

bill_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for the customer's billing statements.

tools.name: list_bills
tools.description: Retrieve a list of the customer's bills, most recent first.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

limit.description: Maximum number of bills to return.

bill_id.description: The unique identifier of the billing statement.

issue_date.description: The date the bill was issued in ISO 8601 format.

total_due.description: The total amount due on the bill.

status.description: The current status of the bill (e.g., 'paid', 'pending', 'overdue').

bills.description: List of billing statements for the customer, ordered most recent first.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Retrieve current data usage information for a specific line.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.
The unique identifier of the mobile line.

data_used_gb.description: Amount of data consumed in gigabytes during the current cycle.

data_refueling_gb.description: Additional data purchased for this cycle in gigabytes.

cycle_end_date.description: Date when the current billing cycle ends in ISO 8601 format.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.
The unique identifier of the mobile line.

status.description: The new status of the line after suspension.

suspension_start_date.description: Date when the suspension takes effect in ISO 8601 format.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.
The unique identifier of the mobile line.

status.description: The new status of the line after resumption.

tools.name: enable_roaming
tools.description: Enable international roaming on a mobile line.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.
The unique identifier of the mobile line.

roaming_enabled.description: Indicates whether international roaming is now enabled on the line.

tools.name: disable_roaming
tools.description: Disable international roaming on a mobile line.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.
The unique identifier of the mobile line.

roaming_enabled.description: Indicates whether international roaming is now disabled on the line.

tools.name: refuel_data
tools.description: Add more data to a specific mobile line.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.

gb_amount.description: Amount of data to add in gigabytes.

line_id.description: The unique identifier of the mobile line.

new_data_refueling_gb.description: Updated total amount of refueled data in gigabytes.

charge_amount.description: The cost charged for the additional data in the customer's currency.

tools.name: send_payment_request
tools.description: Send a payment request to the customer for a specific bill.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.

bill_id.description: The unique identifier of the billing statement.
The unique identifier of the billing statement.

status.description: The current status of the payment request (e.g., 'sent', 'delivered', 'failed').
